name: cicaddy
description: A Python-based pipeline AI agent framework that runs AI-driven tasks inside CI/CD pipeline jobs with multi-LLM support (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude), MCP tool integration, and DSPy-based task definitions for agentic workflows.
community_quotes: CI as an agentic runtime - no separate platform needed
One-shot execution with multi-turn reasoning
Security through containerization
Your CI system is the scheduler, executor, and audit trail

name: JetBrains Air
description: An agentic development environment from JetBrains that allows developers to delegate coding tasks to multiple AI agents and run them concurrently. Built on 26 years of JetBrains IDE experience, Air supports Codex, Claude Agent, Gemini CLI, and Junie out of the box with agent orchestration and concurrent task execution.
community_quotes: A new wave of dev tooling built on 26 years of experience
Not just a chat window - a real agentic development environment
Switch agents freely across projects
Run agents locally or in Docker containers and Git worktrees

name: Junie CLI
description: JetBrains' LLM-agnostic coding agent that works from the terminal, inside any IDE, in CI/CD, and on GitHub or GitLab. Supports all top-performing models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Grok with BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) pricing.
community_quotes: LLM-agnostic coding agent now in Beta
One-click migration from other agents like Claude Code and Codex
Bring JetBrains quality to any environment
Free access to Gemini 3 Flash for one week

name: VS Code 1.111 Autopilot
description: VS Code's first autonomous AI agent mode (Autopilot) that allows AI to work independently until task completion, with new permissions controls for agent autonomy. Switched VS Code to weekly release cadence.
community_quotes: First autonomous AI agent mode in VS Code
All new features in version 1.111 are AI-related
Users can control how much autonomy an AI agent has during sessions
Also referred to as 'YOLO mode' because it auto-accepts everything
Some developers find it 'scary' due to the autonomous nature

name: AutoResearch
description: An autonomous AI research lab that runs on a single GPU, allowing AI agents to run hundreds of experiments overnight and self-improve through iteration. Released by Andrej Karpathy with just 630 lines of Python code.
community_quotes: 10,000+ GitHub stars within days of release
A tiny but complete AI research lab
The agent modifies training scripts and iterates on improvements autonomously
AI self-evolving software capabilities

name: OpenAI Codex Windows
description: OpenAI's agentic coding app launched for Windows with native sandboxing, PowerShell support, and new WinUI and ASP.NET skills. Provides multi-agent task management, worktree support, and skills framework for extending beyond code generation.
community_quotes: Native Windows agent sandbox open-sourced on GitHub
Multi-agent coding with coordinated teams
Skills for Figma, Linear, Cloudflare, Netlify, Vercel
No Mac required to use Codex
